productDisplayName: Nautica Voyage Men Fragrance Gift Set
description: Inspired by the carefree life of a sailor, nautica Voyage for men has strong aquatic traces. Perfect for stylish evenings in the city, this set, bottled in delectable blue flasks and canisters, has top notes of lavender, juniper and pink pepper with floral and subtle woodsy tones. 100 ml NAUTICA Voyage Eau De Toilette 75 ml Nautica Voyage deodorant 75 ml Nautica Voyage after shave 30 ml Nautica Voyage Eau De Toilette spray
